THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEHRENDTSEN, VANETTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 730 22ND STREET #28, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL NOV-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, BOTH SIDES BEAR OWN FEES & COSTS. PLTF RETAINS ANY DEPOSIT AND INTEREST. IF DEFT VACATES IN TIMELY MANNER, PLTF WILL MOVE TO SET ASIDE JUDGMNT & DISMISS W/PREJUDICE.
